text:
It's the afternoon, and my wife is napping peacefully. My two dogs are sprawled out in front of the door, occasionally nudging each other with their paws or whining. They've been that way all day.

I get a phone call.

"Hello?"

"Hi there! It's Jen. How's your day going?"

They perk up immediately.

"Nothing much. Just waiting for you."

I laugh. "I've got hot cocoa waiting for me. What's up?"

"Would you believe I found a goldfish?"

I picture it.

"I caught it swimming in the courtyard?"

"You're kidding!"

"Really? How?"

"Through my purse."

Oh man.

"I gotta go. See you later!"

Later finds me happily munching on my goldfish.

My dogs look at me with those sleepy eyes.

"What's it like?" I ask.

"It's... kinda squishy?" my dog says tentatively.

"Soft?" I guess.
